name: Dashboard Viewer
author: civicognita
description: Overview dashboard for administration and ops projects — status panels, log streams, and metric widgets

permissions.reason: Reads project status files and logs

widgets.content:
## Dashboard Viewer

Monitor project health, view logs, and track key metrics.

- **Status panels** for service health
- **Log streams** from project containers
- **Metric widgets** for at-a-glance numbers

Configure widgets per project in the MApp settings.

prompts.label: Ops Assistant
prompts.description: AI assistance for operations monitoring and troubleshooting
prompts.systemPrompt: This is an administration/ops project. Help the user monitor status, troubleshoot issues, and manage infrastructure. Focus on operational concerns.
